items.h: Tony Khan Adds 6-Way Ladder Match To AEW Redemption

items.h: Jeff Jarrett Thinks WWE Helped AEW With Chicagoland Booking
items.p: Jeff Jarrett has shared his thoughts on WWE's counterprogramming against AEW All Out and is confident that Tony Khan's promotion will come out on top.
